rationale: Implementation cleanly removes the prior "skip ResolveRoute when harness pinned" branch and routes all run/work invocations through ResolveRoute with full (Profile, Harness, Model, Provider) plumbing. Upstream typed errors are returned verbatim (no `fmt.Errorf("...: %w", ...)` wrapping on the routing error path), satisfying the D5 contract. Test seam via `SetAgentServiceFactoryForTest` is appropriately scoped, and the five e2e tests map 1:1 to the ACs.
